skills.name: Database Selection
skills.desc: Database selection involves using the 'USE' statement to specify the database with which you want to work.

skills.name: Database Creation
skills.desc: Database creation encompasses the 'CREATE DATABASE' statement, allowing you to create new databases.

skills.name: Database Deletion
skills.desc: Database deletion involves the 'DROP DATABASE' statement to remove databases when needed.

skills.name: Table Creation
skills.desc: Table creation involves defining the structure of database tables using SQL statements like 'CREATE TABLE'.

skills.name: Table Removal
skills.desc: Table removal is the process of deleting database tables using SQL statements like 'DROP TABLE'.

skills.name: Table Modification
skills.desc: Table modification includes altering the structure of existing database tables, using SQL statements like 'ALTER TABLE'.

skills.name: Data Retrieval
skills.desc: Data retrieval involves fetching data from database tables using SQL queries, primarily 'SELECT' statements.

skills.name: Data Insertion
skills.desc: Data insertion is the process of adding new data records to database tables using SQL 'INSERT' statements.

skills.name: Data Update
skills.desc: Data update involves modifying existing data in database tables using SQL 'UPDATE' statements.

skills.name: Data Deletion
skills.desc: Data deletion is the process of removing data records from database tables using SQL 'DELETE' statements.

skills.name: External Code Execution
skills.desc: Understanding and executing external code within MySQL, enhancing database functionality.

skills.name: DB Function - Info Retrieval
skills.desc: This skill involves using database functions to retrieve information about the database and its objects.

skills.name: User Info Function
skills.desc: User info functions provide information about database users and their privileges.

skills.name: DB Version Check
skills.desc: Checking the version of the MySQL database being used.

skills.name: Integer Type
skills.desc: Understanding and working with integer data types in MySQL.

skills.name: Variable Character Type
skills.desc: Managing variable character data types, such as VARCHAR, in MySQL.

skills.name: Date Type
skills.desc: Working with date and time data types in MySQL.

skills.name: Index Management
skills.desc: Index management involves creating and maintaining indexes on database tables to speed up query performance.

skills.name: User Authentication
skills.desc: Implementing user authentication mechanisms to control access to the database.

skills.name: Permission Granting
skills.desc: Granting specific permissions to database users for various operations.

skills.name: Permission Revocation
skills.desc: Revoking previously granted permissions to restrict or change user access.

skills.name: Data Export Utility
skills.desc: Using utilities to export data from MySQL databases to external files or formats.

skills.name: Status Overview
skills.desc: Obtaining an overview of the current status and health of the MySQL server.

skills.name: Configuration Overview
skills.desc: Reviewing and configuring the MySQL server settings.

skills.name: Admin Utility
skills.desc: Using administrative utilities to manage and monitor the MySQL server.

skills.name: Procedure Management
skills.desc: Procedure management involves creating and managing stored procedures in MySQL, which are reusable blocks of SQL code.

skills.name: View Management
skills.desc: View management covers creating and managing database views, which are virtual tables based on the result of a SQL query.
